WHATSAPP.TITLE: WhatsApp
WHATSAPP.DESCRIPTION: Connect your WhatsApp session to send patient reminders.
WHATSAPP.SCAN_QR: Scan the QR code with your WhatsApp
WHATSAPP.QR_STALE_HINT: The QR may be about to expire. Wait for automatic refresh or press "Refresh QR".
WHATSAPP.INVALID_QR_REGENERATING: An invalid QR was detected. Regenerating automatically...

NOTIFICATIONS.TITLE: WhatsApp Notifications
NOTIFICATIONS.DESCRIPTION: Set rules, select patients, and send reminders in a clear and fast workflow.

SESSION.TITLE: WhatsApp Session
SESSION.SETUP_REQUIRED: You must connect WhatsApp before sending reminders. Set up the session in your profile.

RULE.TITLE: Reminder rules
RULE.TOOLTIP_GENERAL: Decide when automatic reminders are sent and which hours should NOT send messages.
RULE.TOOLTIP_HOURS_BEFORE: How many hours before the appointment to send the reminder. Example: 24 = a day before.
RULE.TOOLTIP_RENEWAL_AFTER: How many days must pass since the last visit to consider it time for renewal. Example: 365 = once a year.
RULE.TOOLTIP_NOTIFY_BEFORE: How many days before the renewal to start notifying. Example: 15 = notify 15 days earlier.
RULE.TOOLTIP_QUIET_HOURS_START: Time range when automatic messages are paused (night silence).
RULE.TOOLTIP_QUIET_HOURS_END: Time range when automatic messages are paused (night silence).
RULE.TOOLTIP_ACTIVE: If enabled, automatic reminders are sent. If disabled, patients won't get automatic notices.

TEMPLATE.HELP: Use the editor to insert variables without typing braces manually.
TEMPLATE.MODAL_DESCRIPTION: Insert variables with one click. They are replaced with patient data when sending.
TEMPLATE.LABEL: Template
TEMPLATE.PLACEHOLDER: Write your message here. Use the chips below to insert variables.
TEMPLATE.PREVIEW_EMPTY: Your message preview will appear here...
TEMPLATE.DEFAULT_MESSAGE: Hi {{nombres}} {{apellidos}}, this is a reminder that your lens renewal is coming soon. Schedule your appointment whenever you like.
TEMPLATE.TOOLTIP_MODAL: Create a reusable message. Variables are replaced automatically on send.
TEMPLATE.TOOLTIP_INSERT: Insert this variable into the message.
TEMPLATE.TOOLTIP_MESSAGE_TEMPLATE: This text is sent to all selected patients.

QR.GATE_DESCRIPTION: Link your WhatsApp account by scanning a QR code. Only then you'll be able to send automatic reminders to your patients.
QR.PREPARING_DESCRIPTION: We're starting WhatsApp Web. This may take a few seconds.
QR.SCAN_DESCRIPTION: Point your camera to this code from WhatsApp on your phone.
QR.CONNECTED_DESCRIPTION: You can now send automatic and manual reminders.
QR.STEP2: Tap Menu or Settings → Linked devices
QR.STEP3: Point your phone at this screen to scan the code

GATE.LOCKED_HINT: The module tools unlock once your session is active.

APPOINTMENTS_TREND.TITLE: Appointments Trend
APPOINTMENTS_TREND.TOOLTIP: Shows how many appointments we have each month, helping us see busy periods and plan better.

DIAGNOSIS_FREQUENCY.TITLE: Most Frequent Diagnoses
DIAGNOSIS_FREQUENCY.TOOLTIP: Lists the most common eye problems we diagnose, so we know what conditions to prepare for.

LABORATORY_ORDERS.TITLE: Laboratory Orders Status
LABORATORY_ORDERS.TOOLTIP: Shows which lab orders are waiting and which are ready, keeping track of our work.

PRODUCTS_INVENTORY.TITLE: Product Inventory by Stock Level
PRODUCTS_INVENTORY.TOOLTIP: Groups products by stock level (low, medium, high) to help us know what needs restocking.
PRODUCTS_INVENTORY.ALERT_MESSAGE: The following products have low stock:
PRODUCTS_INVENTORY.MEDIUM_STOCK_MESSAGE: Products with moderate stock that require monitoring.
PRODUCTS_INVENTORY.HIGH_STOCK_MESSAGE: Products with abundant and well-stocked inventory.

TOP_PRODUCTS_SOLD.TITLE: Top Sold Products
TOP_PRODUCTS_SOLD.TOOLTIP: Shows products with the highest sold quantity for the selected period.
TOP_PRODUCTS_SOLD.NO_DATA: No sales recorded for this period

SHIFT_STATUS.TITLE: Shift Status Distribution
SHIFT_STATUS.TOOLTIP: Shows the percentage of appointments that are confirmed, cancelled, or completed.

PATIENTS_AGE.TITLE: Patient Age Distribution
PATIENTS_AGE.TOOLTIP: Groups patients by age to understand our patient demographics better.

TRANSFER_STOCK.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not complete the stock transfer

ADD_STOCK.TITLE: Add stock

QUICK_STOCK.TITLE: Stock by code
QUICK_STOCK.DESCRIPTION: Find a product by code to add stock or create it if it doesn't exist.
QUICK_STOCK.CODE_PLACEHOLDER: Type or scan the product code
QUICK_STOCK.SCAN_HELP: If the browser blocks live camera access, the phone browser will open the device camera to capture an image of the barcode (no mobile app required).
QUICK_STOCK.NOT_FOUND: No product found with that code in the active branch.
QUICK_STOCK.LOOKUP_ERROR: The code could not be validated right now. Check your connection and try again.
QUICK_STOCK.FLOW_PRODUCT_FOUND_TEXT: The add stock form for {{product}} will open now.
QUICK_STOCK.FLOW_PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND_TEXT: The create product form will open with code {{code}} prefilled.
QUICK_STOCK.CAMERA_ERROR: Camera could not be started. You can continue by typing the code manually.
QUICK_STOCK.CAMERA_NOT_SUPPORTED: This browser does not support camera access for scanning.
QUICK_STOCK.CAMERA_INSECURE_CONTEXT: To use live camera scanning, open the system in the browser over HTTPS or localhost.
QUICK_STOCK.CAMERA_PERMISSION_DENIED: Camera permission denied. Enable it in the browser to scan.
QUICK_STOCK.CAMERA_NOT_FOUND: No camera device was found on this device.
QUICK_STOCK.CAMERA_IN_USE: Camera is being used by another app or browser tab.
QUICK_STOCK.FILE_SCAN_ERROR: The barcode could not be read from the captured image. Try again with better focus and lighting.
